title: 'Eliyph@lehuw #0466
definition:
Elipheleh = "my God sets him apart" or "my God distinguishes him"

 1) a Levite gatekeeper and musician for David
nasbUsage:
Definition: Elipheleh = "my God sets him apart" or "my God distinguishes him"

 1) a Levite gatekeeper and musician for David

    NASB:  may God distinguish him, a doorkeeper
